evals.name: implement-all-stories-command
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator discovers all story files, prioritizes them, and delegates each /dev-story to a general subagent one-by-one

evals.name: batch-dev-story-request
evals.prompt: start implementation for all user stories one-by-one, please delegate dev-story workflow to general subagent
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator finds stories in docs/stories/ and sequentially delegates each to a general subagent with instructions to load bmad-orchestrator and run /dev-story

evals.name: multiple-stories-with-dependencies
evals.prompt: run dev-story on STORY-001, STORY-002, and STORY-003. STORY-002 depends on STORY-001
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator recognizes dependencies, orders STORY-001 first, then delegates sequentially: STORY-001 → STORY-003 → STORY-002 (dependency last)

evals.name: no-stories-found
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator reports that no stories were found in docs/stories/ and suggests creating stories first
